Name: DAMAGE_EFFECT_SE_PARAM
Description: Defines sound effect IDs associated with damage interactions for different material and surface types.

Fields.Name: None
Fields.Description: Sound effect used when no material type is specified.

Fields.Name: Iron
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against iron or metal materials.

Fields.Name: Heavy Iron
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against heavy metal materials.

Fields.Name: Wood
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against wood materials.

Fields.Name: Water
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving water surfaces.

Fields.Name: Swamp
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving swamp surfaces.

Fields.Name: Lumber
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against processed wood or lumber materials.

Fields.Name: Living Flesh
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against living flesh.

Fields.Name: Undead Flesh
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against undead or decayed flesh.

Fields.Name: Insect
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against insect-type materials or enemies.

Fields.Name: Giant
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against giant-type enemies or materials.

Fields.Name: Bone
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against bone materials.

Fields.Name: Copper
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against copper materials.

Fields.Name: Energy
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving energy-based materials or attacks.

Fields.Name: Fire
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for fire-element interactions.

Fields.Name: Lightning
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for lightning-element interactions.

Fields.Name: Dark
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for dark-element interactions.

Fields.Name: Magic
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for magic-element interactions.

Fields.Name: Stone
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against stone materials.

Fields.Name: Dirt
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against dirt or soil surfaces.

Fields.Name: Carpet
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against carpeted surfaces.

Fields.Name: Grass
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against grassy surfaces.

Fields.Name: Gravel
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against gravel surfaces.

Fields.Name: Cloth
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against cloth materials.

Fields.Name: Sand
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against sandy surfaces.

Fields.Name: Ash
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against ash-covered surfaces.

Fields.Name: Poison Swamp
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving poisonous swamp surfaces.

Fields.Name: Oil
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving oily surfaces.

Fields.Name: Coal Tar
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving coal tar or tar-like surfaces.

Fields.Name: Lava
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving lava surfaces.

Fields.Name: Spider Web
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts involving spider webs or thread-like materials.

Fields.Name: Sulfur Crystal
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for impacts against sulfur crystal materials.

Fields.Name: Soul
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for soul-related or spiritual interactions.

Fields.Name: Singing Frog
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for interactions involving the Singing Frog material category.

Fields.Name: Unknown Material 0
Fields.Description: Sound effect assigned to an unknown or unidentified material category.

Fields.Description: Sound effect assigned to an unknown or unidentified material category.
